title: ilex rugosa var. stenophylla
intro: Ilex rugosa var. stenophylla, also known as the Japanese holly or small-leaved holly, is a shrub-like plant in the Ilex genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Ilex rugosa var. stenophylla include its potential to prevent cardiovascular disease, improve immune function, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
